Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to convert raw system log into a process mining event log with at least Case ID Activity Name Timestamp

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: One approach each document or each work object is a case so each distinct window document could be a separate case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The instruction says Case can represent a logical unit of user work such as editing a specific document handling a particular email or reviewing a certain PDF so each distinct document or email can be a case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we can define case IDs based on each unique window title document This yields 5 cases Document1 Quarterly Report Email thread Report Draft Budget 2024

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Thus we see four distinct objects Document1 docx Quarterly Report docx Email thread Email about Annual Meeting PDF Report Draft Excel Budget 2024

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: If multiple plausible interpretations of the cases exist choose the one that leads to a coherent analyst friendly event log so we can decide on case grouping that yields clear distinct cases

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus we will assign case IDs for each unique window document This yields 5 cases Document1 Quarterly Report Email Annual Meeting Report Draft Budget 2024

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to translate raw actions to standardized activity names For each event we need to map FOCUS could be Open Document or Switch to Document TYPING Edit Document SAVE Save Document SWITCH Switch Application Open Email Reply to Email Send Email Scroll Document Highlight Text Close Document

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets standardize as Open Document Focus Window Open Email Read Email Reply to Email Compose Reply Send Email Open PDF Scroll PDF Highlight Text Open Spreadsheet Edit Spreadsheet Save Spreadsheet

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Thus case Document1 will have events open at 090000 edit two typing save switch away at 090145 switch to Document1 at 090600 typing save close Thus case Document1 has 9 events

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case Quarterly Report includes focus at 085950 focus again at 090715 typing save close

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case Email includes switch to Email open email read email reply compose send

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case PDF includes switch to PDF scroll PDF highlight text

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case Excel includes open spreadsheet edit spreadsheet edit spreadsheet save spreadsheet

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The event log should be sorted by timestamp globally but each case has its own sequence Usually event logs are a flat list sorted by timestamp with case ID

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We should verify that we have correct mapping for each row and ensure case IDs match
